original_image_tags: A dark, negative-style scan of a typed document page. The background is black, and the text appears white. The page has three hole-punch marks on the left margin and a page number "3" at the bottom center. A handwritten annotation is visible in the upper left margin.

elements.description: Typed text on a dark background. Text includes references to an 'explosion over Norcatur' and a suggestion to 'watch the moon'. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other visual elements are present.
